nodes.title: Help
widgets_values:
# Model Download

## Download checkpoint from here: [https://huggingface.co/Phr00t/WAN2.2-14B-Rapid-AllInOne/tree/main](https://huggingface.co/Phr00t/WAN2.2-14B-Rapid-AllInOne/tree/main)


### I am using V1, you can use V1 to V5. Experiment to see which version works for your character.
